## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] READMEs / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if the change is user-facing
- [ ] `claude plugin validate .` passes (for plugin or manifest changes)
